mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name, t2.name create_dept_name, t3.name create_post_name FROM tmp_demo_generate t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_dept t2 ON t.create_dept = t2.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_post t3 ON t.create_post = t3.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.name},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.content},'%')
AND t.auth like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.auth},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.email like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.email},'%')
AND t.images like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.images},'%')
AND t.files like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.files},'%')
AND t.video like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.video},'%')
AND t.vue_number like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueNumber},'%')
AND t.vue_radio like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueRadio},'%')
AND t.vue_textarea like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueTextarea},'%')
AND t.vue_checkbox like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueCheckbox},'%')
AND t.vue_select like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueSelect},'%')
AND t.select_enum like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.selectEnum},'%')
AND t.select_url like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.selectUrl},'%')
AND t.select_json like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.selectJson},'%')
AND t.vue_date like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueDate},'%')
AND t.vue_datetime like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueDatetime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_post like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.createPost},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.redio_enum like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.redioEnum},'%')
AND t.radio_url like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.radioUrl},'%')
AND t.radio_json like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.radioJson},'%')
AND t.checkbox_enum like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.checkboxEnum},'%')
AND t.checkbox_url like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.checkboxUrl},'%')
AND t.checkbox_json like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.checkboxJson},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM tmp_demo_generate t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.name},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.content},'%')
AND t.auth like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.auth},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.email like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.email},'%')
AND t.images like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.images},'%')
AND t.files like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.files},'%')
AND t.video like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.video},'%')
AND t.vue_number like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueNumber},'%')
AND t.vue_radio like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueRadio},'%')
AND t.vue_textarea like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueTextarea},'%')
AND t.vue_checkbox like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueCheckbox},'%')
AND t.vue_select like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueSelect},'%')
AND t.select_enum like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.selectEnum},'%')
AND t.select_url like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.selectUrl},'%')
AND t.select_json like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.selectJson},'%')
AND t.vue_date like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueDate},'%')
AND t.vue_datetime like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.vueDatetime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_post like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.createPost},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.redio_enum like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.redioEnum},'%')
AND t.radio_url like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.radioUrl},'%')
AND t.radio_json like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.radioJson},'%')
AND t.checkbox_enum like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.checkboxEnum},'%')
AND t.checkbox_url like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.checkboxUrl},'%')
AND t.checkbox_json like concat('%',#{tmpDemoGenerateEntity.checkboxJson},'%')

SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM tmp_demo_generate t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_dept t2 ON t.create_dept = t2.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_post t3 ON t.create_post = t3.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
